project_info.vibe: Command-center focus, tactical minimalism, elite athleticism

headings.usage: Workout names, major section titles, numbers

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen flex flex-col relative bg-[#0A0A0A]
spacing_and_layout.density: Tight (gap-2 to gap-4) for workout logging to maximize screen real estate.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Flat backgrounds with 1px solid stroke (border-white/10). Avoid soft shadows.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-bold rounded-lg px-6 py-4 w-full uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.secondary: bg-[#141414] text-white border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-6 py-4

inputs.text: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 text-white placeholder-zinc-500 rounded-lg p-4 focus:border-[#FF3B30] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B30]
inputs.workout_set: Grid row with minimal padding. Columns: Set #, Weight, Reps, Checkbox. Inputs should have text-center and subtle bg (bg-white/5).

cards.base: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-4 md:p-6
cards.exercise_row: flex items-center justify-between py-3 border-b border-white/5 last:border-0

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto h-20 bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 flex justify-around items-center z-50 pb-safe
navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-40 bg-[#0A0A0A] px-4 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

icons.usage: Use icons for Bottom Nav (Home, Dumbbell, BarChart, User) and actions (Plus, Play, Check).

onboarding_hero.alt: Dark gym interior with exercise equipment visible
onboarding_hero.usage: Background image for the Login/Signup screen. Apply bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text contrast.

workout_motivation.alt: Row of exercise machines in a dark gym
workout_motivation.usage: Use selectively on empty states or success screens.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='start-workout-btn'). Use kebab-case and role-based names.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on dark backgrounds meets APCA guidelines. Use Text Shadow if overlaying text on images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI focusing on a mobile-first 'App' layout (max-w-md mx-auto) for web.
Implement the 'Performance Pro' archetype strictly. No pastel colors, no soft UI. Use #0A0A0A base and #FF3B30 (Electric Blaze) accents.
Workout logging tables must be dense and grid-based. Use pure flex/grid rows to optimize space, inspired by Strong/Hevy patterns.
Incorporate a persistent bottom navigation bar for core routes, using fixed max-w-md layout.
Include an immersive onboarding/login screen using the provided onboarding_hero image URL with a dark overlay.
For the Analytics section, use Recharts with pure white (#FFFFFF) for the primary metric line and Electric Blaze (#FF3B30) for accents, against #141414 card backgrounds.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Import and use 'Bebas Neue' for punchy headings. Use 'DM Sans' for body text. Add these via Google Fonts in index.html.
CRITICAL: Replace default Shadcn component radii with rounded-lg to maintain the 'Tactical Minimalism' look.
Ensure the 'Set Checkbox' changes to a solid Electric Green (#32D74B) when a set is completed, to provide immediate positive feedback.
